summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features completed successfully: 1) Shareable Participant Links, 2) PDF Report Generation, 3) Data Export Validation. All backend APIs (22/22 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Feature 1 - Shareable Links: GET /api/experiments returns experiments with share_code field
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: GET /api/experiments/join/JIT2026A returns correct experiment
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: GET /api/experiments/join/SCF2026B returns correct experiment
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: GET /api/experiments/join/FAD2026C returns correct experiment
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: GET /api/experiments/join/CTL2026D returns correct experiment
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Lowercase share codes work (case-insensitive)
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Invalid share code returns 404 with error message
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Frontend /study/JIT2026A redirects to consent page
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Invalid /study/INVALID999 shows error page
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Entering valid code on landing page navigates to consent
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Entering invalid code shows error message
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Experiments page shows share codes for all 4 experiments
Feature 1 - Shareable Links: Copy Link buttons present for all experiments
Feature 2 - PDF Report: GET /api/export/pdf-report returns 200 with application/pdf content-type
Feature 2 - PDF Report: PDF has correct magic bytes (%PDF)
Feature 2 - PDF Report: PDF download triggered from Analytics page button
Feature 2 - PDF Report: PDF Report button visible on Analytics page
Feature 3 - Validated Data: GET /api/export/validated-research-data returns 200
Feature 3 - Validated Data: Response contains data_integrity field
Feature 3 - Validated Data: Response contains strategy_summary field
Feature 3 - Validated Data: Response contains demographics_summary field
Feature 3 - Validated Data: Sessions have cross-referenced experiment data
Feature 3 - Validated Data: Validated Data button visible on Analytics page
Feature 3 - Validated Data: Download triggered from Analytics page button
Researcher login with password pmresearch2026 works
Load Sample Data button seeds experiments with share codes
All existing endpoints still functional (experiments, participants, sessions, analytics)
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed creates 4 experiments with predefined share codes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (Shareable Participant Links, PDF Report Generation, Data Export Validation) are fully implemented and working. The seed data creates 4 experiments with share codes JIT2026A, SCF2026B, FAD2026C, CTL2026D. The PDF export generates a thesis-quality report with strategy comparisons. The validated data export includes cross-referenced session data with demographics.

frontend_routes: Landing page share code input with API validation
ui_elements: Share code display on experiment cards
Copy Link button for each experiment

pdf_report_generation.ui_element: PDF Report button on Analytics page

data_export_validation.ui_element: Validated Data button on Analytics page
